summary: M5-CLIENT-PLAYABLE-UI-001 is CLOSED only after PR #114 passed CI, merged into main, local main synchronized to origin/main, and both task child threads were closed. The integrated branch adds the M5 playable client flow, read-model driven command/preview/result surfaces, save/load session path, Storybook/Web/Playwright evidence, and UI reason display without expanding into Electron packaging, manual battle UI, telemetry, server/multiplayer, branding, release, or commercial scope.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed in 1m41s; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed in 54s.
Merged PR #114 and synchronized local main to 5502087977416f2720e084337b65c16c472a4d14.

tests_run.result: Local main and origin/main both resolve to 5502087977416f2720e084337b65c16c472a4d14 before closure branch edits.
Both task child threads returned completed previous_status and were closed.

decisions: Mark M5-CLIENT-PLAYABLE-UI-001 CLOSED because accepted implementation and independent QA evidence are integrated into origin/main via PR #114.
Keep M5 formal passage, release/commercial decisions, and manual node battle out of scope and as future Human Gates where applicable.
Continue autonomous M5 execution after closure merge by selecting the highest-priority dependency-ready M5 task from taskctl ready.
risks: P3: M5 desktop packaging and Electron save adapter smoke remain downstream scope in M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001.
P3: Multi-year AI stability remains downstream validation scope in M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001.
requested_action: Commit closure, open closure PR, wait for CI, merge into main, synchronize main, then start the next READY M5 task.
